label: peer_reviewed_quantitative
description: Published mainland-vs-island trait values with sample sizes / statistics (extractable standardised effect size). e.g. Inoue Campanula series; Ligustrum ovalifolium floral morphology.

label: peer_reviewed_qualitative
description: Peer-reviewed statement of direction of change without numbers (e.g. paper states island form has smaller/paler corolla).

label: photo_blinded_score
description: iNaturalist/GBIF research-grade image scored blind for relative traits (colour intensity
column8: relative corolla proportion). Absolute size only with a scale bar.

label: web_flora_description
description: Non-peer-reviewed textual description asserting a trait difference: flora/field-guide/park-museum/encyclopaedia pages. Low confidence but expands species coverage.

label: occurrence_only
description: Species spans mainland + islands (GBIF/iNat) but no trait evidence. Defines candidate pool membership; NOT a response data point.
